Workarounds
---------------------------------------

Reported workaround #1: bug 208205 comment 22

Reported Workaround #2: bug 208205 comment 33 (kern.ipc.nmbjumbop / kern.ipc.nmbclusters)
	- FreeBSD 11, not reproducible on 12
